For Florida Condo & HOA Owners

YOU OWN THE BUILDING.

What We Do

THREE PILLARS OF
TRANSPARENCY

Every condo owner in Florida has the right to see the documents that govern their building. We make exercising that right effortless.

01

Request Records

We draft and send your official public-records request under Florida Statute 718 or 720, tailored to your building and your question.

02

Track Every Reply

Florida law sets strict deadlines. We monitor every request, send reminders, and flag overdue responses so nothing falls through the cracks.

03

Prove What Happened

Every request, response, and deadline is logged and timestamped, creating an irrefutable paper trail if you ever need to escalate.

The Documents

WHAT YOU HAVE
THE RIGHT TO SEE

Florida law guarantees condo and HOA owners access to a wide range of association records. Here's what you can and should be asking for.

REQUEST YOUR RECORDS →
  • Annual budgets and financial statements
  • Board meeting minutes
  • Contracts with vendors and management companies
  • Reserve fund studies and balances
  • Insurance policies and certificates
  • Governing documents (Declaration, Bylaws, Rules)
  • Correspondence with attorneys
  • Bids and proposals for major work
  • Delinquency reports
  • Enforcement records and violation notices
The Process

HOW IT WORKS

01

Tell Us What You Need

Describe what you're looking for, a specific document, a date range, or a general concern about your building's finances.

02

We Draft the Request

Our team prepares a legally precise public-records request under the applicable Florida statute, addressed to the right party.

03

We Send and Track

We submit the request and monitor the clock. Florida law requires a response within 10 business days. We make sure that deadline is met.

04

You Get the Documents

Records are delivered to you in a secure, organized format. Every interaction is logged so you have a complete record of the process.

Who We Serve

WHO IT'S FOR

Unit Owners

Concerned about how your fees are being spent? You have the right to see every dollar.

Board Members

Ensure your association is operating transparently and protect yourself from liability.

Prospective Buyers

Before you close, know exactly what you're buying into, financially and legally.

Attorneys and Advocates

We handle the administrative work so you can focus on strategy and outcomes.

Journalists and Researchers

Investigating Florida's condo crisis? We know exactly what to ask for and how to ask.

HOA Residents

The same transparency rights that apply to condos apply to HOAs. We serve both.

"Every owner has the right to know. We make sure they can exercise it."
Condo Owners Alliance
Our Story

BUILT BY OWNERS,
FOR OWNERS

Condo Owners Alliance was founded after watching too many Florida owners get stonewalled when they asked simple questions about their buildings. The law was on their side, but the process was opaque, slow, and intimidating.

We built a system to change that. By combining deep knowledge of Florida's condo and HOA statutes with a streamlined request-and-track platform, we give every owner the same access that was once reserved for those with lawyers on retainer.

JOIN THE ALLIANCE →
